content.full_text:
FPPC

JAN 17 9:39 AM '91

California
F.P.P.C.
P.O.Box 807
Sacramento, Ca. 95804-0807

Jan 5, 1991

Legal Dept:

I'm requesting formal assistance with respect to definition of
" source of income " for purpose of disclosure and disqualification
provisions of the Political Reform Act.

I have received informal information from the F.P.P.C. showing similar
to or identical circumstances to mine. Reference was made to File #
I-89-306, addressed to Janet M. Tremlet, City of San Jose. My city
attorney believes that it is in my best interest to obtain a formal
reponse by the F.P.P.C.


FACTS


1. My son is age 21 and is a student of engineering attending
   Santa Clara University.

2. We claim him as dependent

3. Past summer was employed by local Engineering Firm, for
   two months.

4. He had applied for a job at four other firms prior to me
   being elected.

5. My son has returned to the university and isn't receiving
   financial assistance from his summer employer.

6. He has not received stock or has any other vested interest
   in the firm .

Enclosed is copy of information provided me byF.P.P.C. It is our
opinion that the enclosed information also pertains to my circumstances.
Please, I would appreciate a formal confirmation.


Sincerely,

Duane Picanco
Duane Picanco
1234 Park St.
Paso Robles, Ca. 93446
805-238-2123

[The image appears to be a very faded or low-contrast document that is largely illegible. Most of the text is too faint to read with confidence. There are some partially visible words and fragments scattered throughout, but transcribing them would result in significant inaccuracy and speculation. The document appears to have multiple paragraphs and possibly some structured formatting, but the content cannot be reliably determined from this image quality.]

1. My son is age 21 and is a student of engineering attending Santa Clara University.
2. We claim him as dependent
3. Past summer was employed by local Engineering Firm, for two months.
4. He had applied for a job at four other firms prior to me being elected.
5. My son has returned to the university and isn't receiving financial assistance from his summer employer.
6. He has not received stock or has any other vested interest in the firm.

Enclosed is copy of information provided me by F.P.P.C. It is our opinion that the enclosed information also pertains to my circumstances. Please, I would appreciate a formal confirmation.
